definition: Transparency International's composite index measuring perceived levels of public sector corruption across countries, scored 0-100 where higher values indicate less corruption
World Governance Indicators measure of the quality of public services, civil service independence from political pressures, quality of policy formulation and implementation
World Governance Indicators measure of government ability to formulate and implement sound policies and regulations that permit and promote private sector development

display_name: FDI Inflows as Percent of GDP
definition: Net inflows of foreign direct investment as a percentage of gross domestic product, measuring international investor confidence and capital attraction
Percentage of firms or individuals reporting having paid a bribe to a public official in the past year, measuring direct corruption experience rather than perception
Survey-based measure of citizen confidence in national government institutions, typically measured as percentage expressing trust or confidence in government
